word: H5905 - עִיר שֶׁמֶשׁ - ʻÎyr Shemesh - eer sheh'-mesh - Irshemesh

sections.paragraph:
Original: עיר שׁמשׁ

Transliteration: ‛ı̂yr shemesh

Phonetic: eer sheh'-mesh

BDB Definition:

Ir-shemesh = "city of the sun-god"
  1. a city in Dan; probably the same as 'Beth-shemesh'

Origin: from H5892 and H8121

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
